description: Configure seven accessibility and readability settings in Tor Browser to create a high-contrast, large-text reading profile for a user with low vision. Set the minimum font size to 18 pixels and configure the browser to always override page colors. Use white (#ffffff) for text, black (#000000) for the background, and yellow (#ffff00) for unvisited links. Disable the option for web pages to choose their own fonts and enable caret browsing (using cursor keys to navigate within pages). Finally, navigate to https://check.torproject.org/ to confirm the profile is active.
